creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Anton Yuzhaninov from comment #1)

As far as I can tell if llvm's bugzilla 21077 were a
problem still then binutils 2.27.? versions would not
work either.

But reverting to the latest 2.27 vintage materials for
binutils does work. (Keeping clang and such unchanged.)

Something is different between 2.27 and 2.28 as far as
I can tell from the overall behavior of substitution-
testing the alternatives.

This suggests that 2.28 binutils is what would change
to fix the problem. (But it is no proof of such as
the unique solution.)
